name: ASAP4e
description: Speed-optimized ASAP4 variant that flips the classical ASAP polarity to positive-going, delivering fast kinetics and a massive fluorescence increase for photostable recordings in behaving animals.

researchPapers.title: Voltage imaging reveals hippocampal inhibitory dynamics shaping pyramidal memory-encoding sequences
researchPapers.sample: Mouse, hippocampus CA1, PV and SST interneurons, in vivo

researchPapers.title: Imaging sensory transmission and neuronal plasticity in primary sensory neurons with a positively tuned voltage indicator
researchPapers.sample: Mouse, dorsal root ganglia neurons, in vivo
